title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Fonts Online Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a talented digital creator in Nigeria, ready to sell your beautiful fonts online. But when you try to use PayPal or Stripe, you hit a roadblock. These payment giants exclude your country, leaving you with limited options. You're not alone – many creators face this hurdle. But what if you could sell your fonts online without relying on these blocked payment processors? It's time to explore your real options and find a solution that works for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's look at the alternatives. Gumroad is a popular platform for selling digital products, including fonts. However, they charge a 3.5% + 30¢ commission on every sale, which adds up quickly. On the other hand, Payhip offers a flat 5% commission, but they also deduct a processing fee. Meanwhile, NOWPayments is a cryptocurrency payment processor that allows you to sell your fonts without any commission or fees. But how do you integrate it with your website? That's where Unchained Commerce comes in, offering a seamless solution with their Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, each option has its own policies. Gumroad and Payhip exclude countries like Nigeria, while NOWPayments doesn't have such restrictions. However, NOWPayments requires you to have a cryptocurrency wallet, which can be a barrier for some creators. Unchained Commerce simplifies the process with their Web3 Wallet Connect, allowing you to sell to customers worldwide without any geographic limitations.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, NOWPayments offers instant settlements to your cryptocurrency wallet. Gumroad and Payhip, on the other hand, take 2-3 days to process payments. In terms of fees, NOWPayments has no commission or fees, while Gumroad and Payhip charge their respective commissions. However, now you have to consider the costs of converting cryptocurrencies to your local currency, which can be significant. Unchained Commerce's solution helps you navigate these complexities and keeps your costs low.
Don't let geographic restrictions hold you back from selling your fonts online.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key when it comes to selling digital products online. Gumroad and Payhip offer some automation features, but they can be limited. NOWPayments, on the other hand, provides instant automated delivery of your fonts to customers. Unchained Commerce takes it a step further with their Web3 Wallet Connect, which offers seamless automation and delivery capabilities, so you can focus on creating more amazing fonts.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between Gumroad, Payhip, NOWPayments, and Unchained Commerce depends on your specific situation. If you're looking for a easy-to-use platform with decent automation features, Gumroad or Payhip might be a good choice. However, if you want to minimize fees and maximize flexibility, NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce are worth considering. With Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, you can sell your fonts online without any geographic limitations and maximize your earnings.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Cryptocurrencies offer a flexible and fee-efficient way to receive payments from customers worldwide.

If you're looking to expand your digital product sales beyond fonts, Unchained Commerce's solutions can help. Explore their Web3 Wallet Connect frontend integration to sell ebooks, courses, and other digital products without any geographic limitations. Don't miss out on the opportunity to grow your business and reach a wider audience.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling your fonts online without PayPal or Stripe, follow these concrete action steps: 1) Choose the right payment processor, such as NOWPayments or Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect. 2) Set up your website or online store with the chosen payment processor. 3) Create a seamless user experience with automated delivery and payment processing. 4) Promote your fonts to your target audience and drive sales. 5) Monitor your earnings and adjust your strategy as needed. By following these steps, you can overcome the limitations of PayPal and Stripe and sell your fonts online with confidence.
